title: Getting started with statcanR
text: statcanR connects R Statistics Canada’s Web Data Service (WDS). vignette walks complete workflow: describing data need, choosing table, understanding identifier, downloading , inspecting result, optionally saving CSV copy. package supports four common tasks: Find likely tables ordinary-language description. Search exact keywords official table catalogue. Download complete table English French R. Save downloaded table CSV file. four public functions distinct purposes: download functions retrieve complete table, filtered selection observations. Statistics Canada table can large. therefore useful identify right table starting download. optional fifth function, statcan_chat(), wraps statcan_find() user-configured language model explain candidates ask clarifying questions; see Optional: ask language model help.

title: Getting started with statcanR
text: Statistics Canada displays table numbers 10-10-0001-01. first eight digits form WDS Product ID (PID), 10100001; final 01 identifies displayed view. statcanR accepts either displayed table number eight-digit PID: two calls request table.
code: table_data <- statcan_data("10-10-0001-01", "eng") table_data <- statcan_data("10100001", "eng")

title: Getting started with statcanR
text: Use lang = "eng" English table lang = "fra" French table. language controls table contents labels returned Statistics Canada; translation performed statcanR.

title: Getting started with statcanR
text: Use statcan_search() know words occur official title. searches titles without regard letter case: result interactive table displayed RStudio Viewer browser. important columns : title: official table title; id: table number pass download function; release_date: catalogue release date; lang: language searched. several keywords supplied, must occur title. makes searches precise, can also produce matches. happens, remove one keyword use broader term: Search French titles using lang = "fra": catalogue cached 24 hours R’s platform-appropriate user cache directory. statcan_find() caches table metadata used geography checks seven days. caches make repeated searches faster avoid unnecessary requests Statistics Canada. Set refresh = TRUE specifically need fresh information: WDS temporarily unavailable, catalogue searches use recent valid cache issue warning. geography metadata refreshed, statcan_find() uses valid cached metadata possible. Candidates whose geography checked geography_match = NA; match explanation makes uncertainty explicit.

what: Optional: ask a language model for help
title: Getting started with statcanR
text: statcan_chat() entirely optional layer top statcan_find(). sends query statcan_find()’s ranked candidates language model configure, explains candidate best matches asks clarifying question query ambiguous. language model never sees chooses table number ; explains candidates statcan_find() already returned. feature adds new package dependencies, never makes network request unless call statcan_chat() . works OpenAI-compatible chat-completions endpoint. Configure per session options(), environment variables, passing arguments directly:
code: options(   statcanR.llm_endpoint = "https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions",   statcanR.llm_api_key = "sk-...",   statcanR.llm_model = "gpt-4o-mini" ) statcan_chat("R&D expenditures in Quebec since 2020")

title: Getting started with statcanR
text: choosing identifier, pass desired language statcan_data(). example uses relatively small table convenient learning: function downloads unpacks current full-table CSV archive, returns data frame. Start examining dimensions, names, first observations: exact columns depend table selected. statcanR applies consistent rules: first column named REF_DATE; annual, monthly, daily, fiscal reference periods converted Date values can interpreted safely; coordinate columns remain character values leading zeros compound coordinates lost; INDICATOR contains official table title read metadata. example, can select observations 2020 onward ordinary R subsetting: download French version table, change language: source column names remain selected language, assume every English column name identical French equivalent.
code: table_data <- statcan_data("10-10-0001-01", lang = "eng") dim(table_data) names(table_data) head(table_data) recent_data <- table_data[   !is.na(table_data$REF_DATE) &     table_data$REF_DATE >= as.Date("2020-01-01"), ] table_fr <- statcan_data("10-10-0001-01", lang = "fra")

what: Step 3: save a CSV copy when needed
title: Getting started with statcanR
text: need analyse data current R session, statcan_data() sufficient. Use statcan_download_data() also need CSV file. Existing two-argument calls save file current working directory: creates statcan_10100001_eng.csv. keep project files organized, create dedicated directory pass path: output directory must already exist. function returns data frame statcan_data() stores exact CSV path statcan_file attribute. CSV uses UTF-8 encoding, excludes R row names, writes missing values empty fields.
code: table_data <- statcan_download_data("10-10-0001-01", "eng") getwd() output_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), "statcanR-data") dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)  table_data <- statcan_download_data(   "10-10-0001-01",   "eng",   path = output_dir )  attr(table_data, "statcan_file")

title: Getting started with statcanR

code: # This familiar two-argument form remains valid. table_data <- statcan_data("10-10-0001-01", "eng")  # This also remains valid and saves into the working directory. table_data <- statcan_download_data("10-10-0001-01", "eng")

text: Sends query ranked candidates statcan_find() user-configured, OpenAI-compatible chat-completion endpoint, explains candidate(s) best match asks clarifying question query ambiguous. candidate table numbers rankings always come statcan_find() ; language model interprets explains , never allowed propose table number .

code: statcan_chat(   query,   lang = c("eng", "fra"),   n = 5L,   refresh = FALSE,   endpoint = NULL,   api_key = NULL,   model = NULL )

title: Get an LLM's help interpreting a natural-language table search — statcan_chat
text: query One non-empty character string describing desired data. Passed statcan_find(). lang Language table titles model's reply: "eng" "fra". n Maximum number candidates request statcan_find(). refresh Logical; forwarded statcan_find(). endpoint Chat-completions endpoint URL. Defaults getOption("statcanR.llm_endpoint"), Sys.getenv("STATCANR_LLM_ENDPOINT"). api_key API key sent Authorization: Bearer header. Defaults getOption("statcanR.llm_api_key"), Sys.getenv("STATCANR_LLM_API_KEY"). model Model name sent endpoint. Defaults getOption("statcanR.llm_model"), Sys.getenv("STATCANR_LLM_MODEL").

title: Get an LLM's help interpreting a natural-language table search — statcan_chat

Sys.setenv(STATCANR_LLM_ENDPOINT = ...) api_key: options(statcanR.llm_api_key = ...) Sys.setenv(STATCANR_LLM_API_KEY = ...) model: options(statcanR.llm_model = ...) Sys.setenv(STATCANR_LLM_MODEL = ...) network request made unless statcan_chat() called directly.

what: Download a Statistics Canada data table — statcan_data
title: Download a Statistics Canada data table — statcan_data
text: Downloads complete table Statistics Canada's Web Data Service (WDS) returns data frame. Product IDs can supplied familiar hyphenated form (example, "27-10-0014-01") eight-digit PID (example, "27100014").

title: Download a Statistics Canada data table — statcan_data
code: statcan_data(tableNumber, lang)

title: Download a Statistics Canada data table — statcan_data
text: tableNumber Statistics Canada table number Product ID. "27-10-0014-01" "27100014" accepted. lang Language downloaded table: "eng" "fra".

title: Download a Statistics Canada data table — statcan_data
text: data frame containing complete Statistics Canada table.

title: Download a Statistics Canada data table — statcan_data
text: function keeps interface used earlier statcanR releases. English French downloads share processing rules. particular, first column named REF_DATE, coordinates stored character, table title metadata file added INDICATOR.

code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ science <- statcan_data("27-10-0014-01", "eng") science_fr <- statcan_data("27100014", "fra") } # }

title: Download a Statistics Canada table and save a CSV file — statcan_download_data
text: downloaded table. CSV path available statcan_file attribute returned data frame.

what: Find Statistics Canada tables using a natural-language query — statcan_find
title: Find Statistics Canada tables using a natural-language query — statcan_find
text: Interprets short description data needed returns ranked Statistics Canada table candidates. query can contain topic, Canadian geography, reference year range. example, "R&D expenditures Quebec since 2020" interpreted research development expenditure topic, Quebec geography constraint, coverage beginning 2020.

title: Find Statistics Canada tables using a natural-language query — statcan_find
code: statcan_find(query, lang = c("eng", "fra"), n = 5L, refresh = FALSE)

title: Find Statistics Canada tables using a natural-language query — statcan_find
text: query One non-empty character string describing desired data. lang Language table titles: "eng" "fra". n Maximum number candidates return, 1 20. refresh Logical; TRUE, request fresh catalogue fresh candidate metadata WDS.

title: Find Statistics Canada tables using a natural-language query — statcan_find
text: data frame ranked candidates. id contains table number, score relevance score, match_reason explains ranking. Coverage dates describe table whole. geography_match TRUE WDS metadata confirms every geography query, FALSE , NA geography requested validation possible.

title: statcanR 0.3.4
text: statcan_chat() now resolves LLM endpoint, API key, model calling statcan_find(), missing configuration fails immediately instead full catalogue lookup.

title: statcanR 0.3.3
text: Documented statcan_chat() README: added function overview table short “Optional: ask language model help” section, mirroring vignette’s coverage.

title: statcanR 0.3.2
text: Added statcan_chat(), optional layer statcan_find() sends query ranked candidates user-configured, OpenAI-compatible chat-completions endpoint. model explains best match asks clarifying question query ambiguous, can never invent table number reason downloaded data — always come statcan_find() . feature adds new package dependencies makes network request unless statcan_chat() called directly. Configure endpoint, API key, model via function arguments, options(statcanR.llm_endpoint = , statcanR.llm_api_key = , statcanR.llm_model = ), Sys.setenv(STATCANR_LLM_ENDPOINT = , STATCANR_LLM_API_KEY = , STATCANR_LLM_MODEL = ).

title: statcanR 0.3.1
text: Fixed statcan_data() statcan_download_data() failing real Statistics Canada tables "Statistics Canada returned empty data metadata file". metadata CSV’s trailing comma multi-section structure confused column detection; parsing now tolerant extra field.

title: statcanR 0.3.1
text: Table titles returned statcan_find() statcan_search() now display HTML/XML characters normally (example, R&D instead R&D). Existing catalogue caches corrected automatically read. statcan_find() recognizes Canada’s major Census Metropolitan Areas (example, Toronto, Montreal, Vancouver) geography constraints, addition provinces territories. statcan_find() expands common acronyms (GDP, CPI, PPI/IPPI, French PIB, IPC) spelled-form queries "GDP industry" match tables whose titles spell term full.

title: statcanR 0.3.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-07-17

title: statcanR 0.3.0
text: Existing calls statcan_search(), statcan_data(), statcan_download_data() remain supported. statcan_data() statcan_download_data() now accept either hyphenated table number "27-10-0014-01" eight-digit Product ID "27100014". statcan_download_data() gains optional path argument. original two-argument form continues save CSV file working directory.

title: statcanR 0.3.0
text: Complete tables now located Statistics Canada’s official getFullTableDownloadCSV Web Data Service method. English French downloads use one shared implementation stable processing rules. Fixed statcan_download_data() returning CSV file written. Fixed French downloads overwriting first data column instead naming REF_DATE. files created active download removed. Earlier versions attempted delete entire R session temporary directory. Network, HTTP, API, ZIP, input failures now produce informative errors. Reference periods parsed consistently COORDINATE remains character column.

title: statcanR 0.3.0
text: Added statcan_find(), interprets English French description subject, Canadian geography, date range returns ranked table candidates explanation match. Geography constraints checked official WDS table metadata. metadata cached seven days, graceful fallback refreshed. statcan_search() retrieves official table catalogue Statistics Canada’s Web Data Service instead shipping static data file. catalogue cached RDS file 24 hours platform-specific user cache directory. valid stale cache used WDS temporarily unavailable. Searches case-insensitive, require supplied keywords, return empty table matches. Corrupt incompatible catalogue caches ignored rebuilt.

title: statcanR 0.3.0
text: Thierry Warin sole author maintainer release. Removed unused package dependencies obsolete bundled catalogue. Moved tests standard tests/testthat structure expanded unit coverage Product IDs, dates, languages, catalogue responses, search. Rebuilt README, vignette, reference documentation, citation metadata, pkgdown website. Added current GitHub Actions workflows multi-platform R CMD check automatic pkgdown deployment.
